---
title: "Update the release catalogue"
subtitle: "BNR info-hub Technical Manual"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
---

# Update the release catalogue

## Purpose

This guide explains how to update the BNR public release catalogue after adding or revising a public output product.

The release catalogue is the public index of BNR analytical products available through the Information Hub.

## Catalogue location

```text
site/downloads/release-catalogue.qmd
```

# Stage 1: Confirm the release details

:::{.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Step 1. Identify the release

For each release, confirm:

- title
- briefing ID
- product type
- domain
- target period
- baseline period if relevant
- status
- web briefing link
- PDF briefing link
- table links
- figure data links
- metadata link
- build record link
:::

:::{.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## Current pilot example

```text
Title: Hospital Cardiovascular Cases in Barbados, 2023
Briefing ID: cvd_cases_2023_v1
Product type: Static briefing
Domain: Cardiovascular disease
Target year: 2023
Baseline: 2018-2022
Status: Draft / pilot
```
:::

# Stage 2: Add or update the entry

:::{.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Step 1. Open the catalogue

```text
site/downloads/release-catalogue.qmd
```
:::

:::{.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Step 2. Add a release card

Each release should include:

- short summary
- detail table
- web briefing link
- PDF link
- public tables
- figure data
- figures
- metadata
- build record
:::

:::{.callout-warning collapse="true"}
## Status field

Use a clear release status.

| Status | Meaning |
|---|---|
| Draft / pilot | Product is being tested and may still change. |
| Approved | Product has been reviewed and approved for public release. |
| Superseded | Product remains available but has been replaced by a newer version. |
| Archived | Product is retained for historical reference. |
:::

# Stage 3: Check links

:::{.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Step 1. Preview the site

```powershell
cd C:\yoshimi-hot\output\analyse-bnr\info-hub\site
quarto preview --port 4200
```
:::

:::{.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## Links to check

Check:

- web briefing
- PDF briefing
- CSV tables
- figure data
- figure images
- metadata YAML
- build YAML
:::
